title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・もっと、もっと

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa!
Seiun Sky won?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I-is this for real?! I totally thought Spe would get
first!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Incredible... Seiun Sky is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yes! This is it—I've wanted to experience this for
so long!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, it feels so gooood... ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh, get a hold of yourself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this is what happens when we face off
against each other, no holds barred... I have no
regrets.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It kinda stings that I lost, but... you were totally
amazing out there!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Geez, you two...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heheh, keep the compliments coming. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Have you decided what race you're gonna run in
next?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: If not, I wanna see you in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass will be there. And I'd love to race against
you again!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get so much better and beat you next
time!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, asking for a rematch already? You're not
gonna let me savor this even one bit, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And you're gonna beat me, huh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's like I've got no choice but to accept. Well, I'm
itching to come up with an even better strategy
anyway. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yep. Guess I'll be running in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What about you, King? Don't you wanna get
revenge on me as well?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Your goading won't sway me. I've already
decided on running in a different race.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm following my own path, and I'm going to
outshine you with my first-rate radiance.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, enjoy your brief time in the spotlight! Ohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh... Whatever you say. Looking forward to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whew... My heart won't stop pounding.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
(Next time... I have to make the race ten times as
exciting!)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Where are youuu?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There you are! Listen, there's something I need
to—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: My leg, I can't...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: You did quite a number on yourself.

After Seiun Sky suddenly collapsed, I carried her
to the doctor in a panic. There, we're given an
upsetting diagnosis.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list: How long does she have to stay off it?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's not that bad of an injury. It won't have
any impact on her training.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
She'll be able to run again soon, but... for the
sake of making a full recovery, I think it's best to
take a pause on racing for now.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Eat plenty of nutritious food, rest, and let
yourself heal. As a medical professional, I believe
that's your best option moving forward.

Sky goes completely silent after the doctor
leaves. As her trainer, I make the final call...
choice_data_list: I think this is the perfect time to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Which means I won't be racing in this year's Arima
Kinen...

Her career as a racer isn't over. She just has to
take the time to recover, then we'll pull out all
the stops.
choice_data_list:
You'll be able to face off against your rivals
another time.

text_block_list.text:
She's got a good head on her shoulders. I'm sure
she'll understand...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...No way.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I said no! If I'm gonna race, I have to do it now!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The next Arima Kinen is gonna be a blast...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I have to be there, to make it more exciting. Sitting it out isn't an option!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can win. I mean, I've finally come this far! Things
were just getting interesting!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What about everyone else, like Spe and Grass?
They overcame all sorts of limits to improve
themselves!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I... I have to defy all their expectations! I have to
win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I have to be in that race... I want to run more
than anything else!

It seems I've misunderstood her determination up
until now. In that case...
choice_data_list: Will you be able to keep up?
Will you be able to keep up?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list: I want to improve your efficiency in training.

text_block_list.text:
I explain that we'll have to shorten training time
while increasing intensity, leaving the remaining
time for warm-ups and other measures to
promote her recovery.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You're gonna let me race?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can do it. If you say jump, I'll jump. I won't play
hooky either.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So...
choice_data_list:
I'll make it so you can safely run in the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer.... Thank you...
